evidence.evidence_excerpt: Livepeer supports two main job types: transcoding (video format conversion) and AI inference (e.g. style transfer, generation). Each follows a similar multi-party flow but with different pipeline details. Transcoding Workflow: When a Gateway (broadcaster) has a live stream (or video) to process, it: Register Funds: Pre-funds an on-chain TicketBroker contract with ETH equal to the expected job fee…
